title: SEC6: Key separation invariant enforced with assertion
description: Identity::generate() [identity.rs:39-46] and from_secret_bytes() [identity.rs:59-62] both assert that Ed25519 seed \!= X25519 seed. The invariant is documented in comments (lines 21, 39, 41, 61) with 'key separation invariant' phrase. Not left to probabilistic chance—enforced with explicit assertions. This prevents accidental reuse of the same entropy for both keys, which would violate cryptographic independence.
